citations.quote: 1 attachment (3 MB) MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf;

findings.text: Email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra includes an attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).
The email body contains a copy of the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct for 2025-26.
The extracted text of both sources is identical and contains only the email body; the embedded Student Licence PDF was not extracted by the pdf_text method.
Binary extraction tool was not invoked in this task; the Student Licence PDF content is not available in the provided source_materials.

proposed_artifacts.content: The email from Edinburgh Napier University (NAP-SRC-0029) references an attached PDF named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB). The extracted text of both sources is identical and contains only the email body, not the embedded Student Licence PDF. The binary extraction tool was not invoked; no Student Licence content is available in the provided source_materials. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded PDF using a binary extraction tool.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction Report for Student Licence PDF

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach, pdftk, or custom script) to extract the embedded PDF attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the source file NAP-SRC-0029. The source file is located at 01-sources/communications/NAP-SRC-0029 - Email - Elbushra, Anfal - Outlook.pdf. Save the extracted PDF as a new source artifact and then extract its text content.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded Student Licence PDF using binary extraction tool
